name: iShares Global Tech ETF
description: The index is designed to measure the performance of global equities in the information technology sector. The fund generally will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of its index and in investments that have economic characteristics that are substantially identical to the component securities of its index and may invest up to 20% of its assets in certain futures, options and swap contracts, cash and cash equivalents. It is non-diversified.

holdings.name: Palantir Technologies Inc Ordinary Shares - Class A
